_comment: Browser-demo fixture for Step 8 — song with synced LRC lyrics + text_overlay display recipe activates the scrolling lyrics overlay. Lyrics drive off audio.currentTime via rAF (per IMPLEMENTATION-GUIDE.md §3.5). text_overlay's preconditions require both lrc_lyrics + lrc_data; supply both.
name: Demo — Text Overlay (Lyrics)

content_metadata.lrc_lyrics:
[00:00.00]The dinosaur opens its mouth
[00:00.50]Slowly, deliberately
[00:01.00]A roar from the deep past
[00:01.50]Echoing through the present
[00:02.00]This is what survival sounds like
